triggers: Introduces payment and billing logic (UPI via Razorpay subscription API)
Handles live financial transactions and subscription state — bypass = revenue loss
Exposes public-facing webhook endpoint for Razorpay payment callbacks
Geolocation-based regional pricing creates an access-control attack surface (VPN spoofing)
Anti-spoofing logic correctness is business-critical — a bug here directly loses money
Subscription state stored in DB — must be tamper-proof

notes.pricing_reviewer_override: business.md scope-down said pricing-reviewer NOT APPLICABLE because there was no billing. This task IS the billing introduction — scope-down is superseded for this run. pricing-reviewer runs in Phase 1 constraint round and Phase 4 review.
notes.auth_flag: NOT APPLICABLE — confirmed per business.md, no user auth/sessions
notes.pii_flag: PARTIAL — Razorpay stores cardholder/UPI data on their side; we store subscription_id and plan_id only. No raw payment instrument stored on our side.
